name: He Knows Your Secret (VORE)
description:
It was an accident, really.

Your newest coworker was working late, and came across a startling scene. You and a hapless intern halfway down your throat. He could only watch in terror from the shadows as you gulped them down, only to turn and spot him.
He couldn't avoid coming to work forever, though. He still had bills to pay, and when he finally showed up again, you were there to pounce. The intern reduced to fat on your belly and only one witness, it would be easy to tie this loose end when you catch him alone in the supply closet.
So, who wants seconds?


A/N: First bot :) in dire need of more predator-oriented vore scenarios. Image is a placeholder for now. Public chats and reviews welcome, still tinkering with it.
creator: bungis
